PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE EITHER THAT HE IS DECEDENT'S PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OR THAT THERE IS NO PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE AND HE IS THE SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST. CCP SECTION 377.30. IF PLAINTIFF ALLEGES STANDING AS THE DECEDENT'S SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST, HE MUST FILE AN AFFIDAVIT OR DECLARATION MEETING THE REQUIREMENTS SET FORTH IN CCP SECTION 377.32. DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ZACHARY KLEINBERG'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege either that he is decedent's personal representative or that there is no personal representative and he is the successor in interest. CCP section 377.30. If plaintiff alleges standing as the decedent's successor in interest, he must file an affidavit or declaration meeting the requirements set forth in CCP section 377.32. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
